MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED, MAR-04-2009: Cassandra Coats, assistant property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Company; Paul Arshawsky, counsel for plaintiff; Julie L. Batz, limited scope attorney for defendant Antionette Green, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 10 Dedman Court, San Francisco, California 94124.

The MAR-09-2009 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
